scripts.build:binding: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release -p opencode-gateway-ffi && wasm-bindgen --target nodejs --out-dir dist/wasm/pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/opencode_gateway_ffi.wasm
scripts.check:all: bun run check:biome && bun run check:binding && bun run check:plugin && bun run check:rust
